We’re turning leftover rice into a bowl of congee and pairing it with a freshly poured Guinness. Staying in is better when everyone’s in on it. ​@guinnessus #f52partner #AD

​Diageo Beer Company USA., New York, NY. Please drink responsibly. Do not share with those under 21.

body:
Have you cooked with prunes lately? If not, consider this your sign. They bring a deep, jammy sweetness that works just as well in savory dishes (think pastas and stews) as it does in desserts.

We rounded up 14 recipes that show off just how versatile California Prunes can be. Tap the link in bio for the full lineup. @caprunes #AD

body:
If prunes aren’t already in your pantry, this might convince you. They add a deep, jammy sweetness that enhances everything from savory mains to baked desserts—and they’re surprisingly versatile once you start cooking with them.

We rounded up 14 recipes that show just how good they can be. @caprunes #AD
